mapper.insert: INSERT INTO daily_phrases (user_id, phrase_date, phrase_kr, meaning_en, romanization, when_to_use, formality_level, similar_expressions, learned, model_used) VALUES (#{userId}, CURRENT_DATE, #{phraseKr}, #{meaningEn}, #{romanization}, #{whenToUse}, #{formalityLevel}, CAST(#{similarExpressions} AS jsonb), #{learned}, #{modelUsed})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, phrase_date, phrase_kr, meaning_en, romanization, when_to_use, formality_level, similar_expressions::text AS similar_expressions, learned, model_used, created_at FROM daily_phrases WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY phrase_date DESC
